name: DeRay Davis
blurb: He won the Comedy Central Laugh Riots competition early in his career and became known for the Barbershop films, the FX series Snowfall, and collaborations with Kanye West.
bio: Antoine DeRay Davis is an American stand-up comedian and actor born and raised in Chicago. He won the Comedy Central Laugh Riots competition early in his career and became known for the Barbershop films, the FX series Snowfall, and collaborations with Kanye West. His debut Netflix special, How to Act Black, premiered in 2017.

timeline.ev: Appears in the film Barbershop as Hustle Guy
Plays Ray the Hustle Guy in Barbershop
Voices skits on Kanye West's The College Dropout
Netflix special How to Act Black premieres
Begins role as Peaches on FX's Snowfall
Begins hosting Ice Cube's Hip Hop Squares revival
Recurs as Peaches on FX's Snowfall (2018-2023)

accolades: Winner of the Comedy Central Laugh Riots competition
Debut Netflix special How to Act Black (2017)
Recurring role on the FX series Snowfall
Won the Comedy Central Laugh Riots stand-up competition (early career)
Host of the Hip Hop Squares revival (2017-2019) and the BET Hip Hop Awards
